speaker: Narrator
text: Welcome to the Google SRE Podcast. Today we are talking about reliability.

speaker: Alice
text: Thanks for having me! Reliability is all about ensuring our systems meet user expectations.

speaker: Bob
text: Absolutely. It starts with setting clear Service Level Objectives (SLOs).

speaker: Alice
text: Yes, and monitoring the right SLIs so we know when we are burning our error budget.

speaker: Bob
text: Once the budget is depleted, we need to pause new features and focus on stability.

speaker: Narrator
text: That's all the time we have for today. Thank you both for joining us!
